citations.narrative:
A new Institutional Official (IO) was appointed on July 2025. At the time of inspection, the facility had not reported this
change to the Deputy Administrator. Prompt notification of substantial changes in operations of a research facility is
essential to assure regulatory compliance. A research facility shall notify the Deputy Administrator of any change in name,
address, or ownership, or other change in operations within 10 days after making the change. Correct by 02/16/2026.

citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
Evaluations of the animal program and facilities were performed in December 2024 and August 2025, 8 months apart.
Semi-annual evaluations (every 6 months) are needed to ensure that the Institutional official is kept informed of the status
of both the animal use program and research facilities. The reports shall be updated at least once every six months upon
completion of the required semiannual evaluations and shall be maintained by the research facility. Correct by
06/05/2026.

Seven cats are currently being housed individually in enclosures that do not have sufficiently elevated resting platforms.
The platforms provided are low to the ground and don’t allow the space under them to be comfortably occupied by the
animal. Elevated resting surfaces allow cats to engage in species-typical behaviors, and the lack of this environmental
complexity may cause distress to the animals. Each enclosure housing cats must contain a resting surface large enough
to hold all the cats comfortably. The resting surfaces must be elevated and must allow the space under them to be
comfortably occupied by the animal. Correct by 02/16/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.30(c) 
   
Registration. 
A new Institutional Official (IO) was appointed on July 2025. At the time of inspection, the facility had not reported this 
change to the Deputy Administrator. Prompt notification of substantial changes in operations of a research facility is 
essential to assure regulatory compliance. A research facility shall notify the Deputy Administrator of any change in name, 
address, or ownership, or other change in operations within 10 days after making the change. Correct by 02/16/2026. 
2.31(c)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
Evaluations of the animal program and facilities were performed in December 2024 and August 2025, 8 months apart. 
Semi-annual evaluations (every 6 months) are needed to ensure that the Institutional official is kept informed of the status 
of both the animal use program and research facilities. The reports shall be updated at least once every six months upon 
completion of the required semiannual evaluations and shall be maintained by the research facility. Correct by 
06/05/2026. 
3.6(b)(4) 
   
Primary enclosures. 
Seven cats are currently being housed individually in enclosures that do not have sufficiently elevated resting platforms. 
The platforms provided are low to the ground and don’t allow the space under them to be comfortably occupied by the 
animal. Elevated resting surfaces allow cats to engage in species-typical behaviors, and the lack of this environmental 
complexity may cause distress to the animals. Each enclosure housing cats must contain a resting surface large enough 
to hold all the cats comfortably. The resting surfaces must be elevated and must allow the space under them to be 
comfortably occupied by the animal. Correct by 02/16/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.

n
